name: Doctor Portuondo
overview: An amusing regression with autobiographical overtones to the therapy that the protagonist follows with Dr. Portuondo, a peculiar Cuban psychoanalyst who shouts at his patients, swears in the name of Freud and drinks Johnnie Walker whiskey.

trailers.title: Doctor Portuondo (ESTRENO EN FILMIN 29/10) - Tráiler (ES) | Filmin
